title: Build an app from your phone in AI Studio
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build a custom image-generation app directly from a mobile browser using Google AI Studio. The tutorial uses voice commands and the Nano Banana API to create "Julia's Plushie Palace" without software installation.
writeup: This tutorial from Google Cloud Tech walks through building a custom image-generation app entirely from a mobile browser using Google AI Studio, with no software installation required. The build uses voice commands to drive code generation and the Nano Banana API, producing a sample app called "Julia's Plushie Palace." It shows that AI Studio can take an app from prompt to working result on a phone alone.
